title: Tender Grilled Turkish Lamb Skewers
description: Fresh, juicy lamb skewers marinated with lemon, oregano, and capers, then grilled to perfection – a light, egg‑free Turkish favorite.
instructions: Whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, oregano, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper in a bowl until well combined.
Add lamb cubes to the bowl, tossing to coat each piece. Stir in capers and chopped mint, then cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour (or overnight for deeper flavor).
Preheat a gas or charcoal grill to medium‑high heat. Thread the marinated lamb onto the soaked skewers, packing them tightly.
Grill the skewers about 3–4 minutes per side until the lamb reaches your preferred doneness (internal temperature 145 °F for medium‑rare).
While grilling, baste the skewers occasionally with the remaining marinade to keep them moist and flavorful.
Remove the skewers from the grill and allow them to rest for 5 minutes before serving. Plate with optional lemon wedges or a cucumber‑yogurt dip and enjoy.
